verses.en: In the name of Allāh, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
verses.id: Dengan nama Allah Yang Maha Pengasih, Maha Penyayang.

verses.en: [All] praise is [due] to Allāh, Lord of the worlds -
verses.id: Segala puji bagi Allah, Tuhan seluruh alam,

verses.en: The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.
It is You we worship and You we ask for help.
verses.id: Hanya kepada Engkaulah kami menyembah dan hanya kepada Engkaulah kami mohon pertolongan.

verses.en: Guide us to the straight path -

verses.arabic: صِرَٰطَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.en: The path of those upon whom You have bestowed favor, not of those who have earned [Your] anger or of those who are astray.
verses.id: (yaitu) jalan orang-orang yang telah Engkau beri nikmat kepadanya; bukan (jalan) mereka yang dimurkai, dan bukan (pula jalan) mereka yang sesat.
